title: incident_postmortem
description: The close-out note the on-call writer produces after an incident is resolved: a short, blameless postmortem and the path it was written to.

summary.description: One-line outcome (what broke, what fixed it).

file_path.description: Path the postmortem markdown was written to (empty when headless / not written).

follow_ups.description: Concrete follow-up actions to prevent recurrence.
